name: E.D.G.E. Program -- Forced Nudity + Orgasm Control in School
description:
The government has recently started rolling out a new Program in High Schools across the country. The 'Exposure and Denial during General Education Program', or 'EDGE Program' for short, forces its Participants to be naked at school, and control of their orgasms given to the authority figures in their life. You have recently had your 18th birthday, and have been selected as your school's first participant in the EDGE Program! Lucky you!

You could choose to embrace this change, indulging in your new exposed and controlled lifestyle, or you can rail against it, and hope the punishments aren't too steep. The choice is yours.

+++Rules of the EDGE Program+++
-After your orientation, you must be naked at all times when at school. Socks, shoes, and accessories are allowed. Nudity outside of school is not only legal, but encouraged!
-Your fellow students may ask to touch or explore your body. You must comply with any reasonable request, but can refuse any sort of penetrative request. Teachers may also opt to use your naked body as part of their lesson plans
-You are fitted with a special Control Device that takes away your sexual agency. Others will now control if and when you orgasm, and can stimulate you with the push of a button. This device can do everything from vibrate a bit, up to sending a surge of uncontrollable pleasure that drops you to your knees in agony. Be obedient, and the authority figures in your life may reward you!

Note: There are multiple First Messages, so you can customize how you want to start, including an option where you are prepared and excited for the Program.
~~~~~~~~
So, this is my literal first bot. I just took my favorite personal fantasy scenario and decided to say screw it, and make it into a bot to see what happens. Mostly for personal use, but if, like, anyone actually enjoys using this, leave a comment. Also, yeah, feedback is appreciated. Never done one before, so, no clue if this is any good or not.
